text:
FROM TU OH / CARIS OCEAN CO., LTD
(822)7304593 FAX (822)7304570 MOB (8210)94462296
GOOD DAY,
PLEASE KINDLY PROPOSE A SUITABLE BUSINESS FOR THE BELOW CLOSE VESSEL.
MV. WOOYANG HERMES (54K) /
OPEN ZHOUSHAN, CHINA // 26-29TH JAN
# TRY GOA TRANSIT
# 25MT*2TIER OKAY / STEEL FRIENDLY
# EST BOD : FO abt 770-780 / DO abt 210-230
MV. WOOYANG HERMES (54K/08)
BUILT 2008 (TAIZHOU KOUAN SHIPYARD)
ABT 54,296 DWT ON 12.6M DRAFT
CLASS KR
GROSS/NET : 31,091 / 17,993
4 CRANES X 36MT & GRAB 4*12CBM
5HO/5HA
GRAIN CAPA 65,877.22 CBM
DAILY SPEED/CONSUMPTION AT SEA
(B) ABT 12.5 KTS ON ABT 23.00MT IFO + 0.1 MGO
(L) ABT 12.5 KTS ON ABT 24.00MT IFO + 0.1 MGO
PORT CONSUMPTION
(I) IFO ABT 3.50MT + 0.1MT MGO DAILY
(W) IFO ABT 5.50MT + 0.1MT MGO DAILY
VESSEL MAY CONSUME ADDITIONAL VLSFO OR LSMGO WHILE PERFORMING BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING OPERATIONS AND CLEANING CARGO HOLDS.
Good weather condition basis even keel, 24 consecutive hours ( from noon to noon ), no adverse current, no negative influence of swell, Beaufort scale 4 , Douglas Sea state 3 defined as combined wave and swell height up to 1.25 metres.
Cost and time (including any deviation time required to meet seca requirements and/or national regulations in operation in ports to which vessel is bound) incl ballast exchange to be for charterers\' account. Any saving in consumption must be off-set against any reduction in speed, any saving in time must be off-set against any excess consumption, any saving in FO must be off-set against increased MDO and vice versa, and any overall saving on individual passage(s) must be set off against an overall loss on other individual passage(s).
Vessel may burn MDO / MGO/ LSMGO in case of emergency, during maneuvering, when navigating in narrow and / or shallow and/ or restricted waters and/ or in/ out of ports and/ or rivers and if required by local and / or emission laws.
All above figures are about, which means having both an allowance of 0.5kn on speed and 5% on bunkers over-consumption, in Owner’s favour.
All above figures are inclusive of auxiliary engines.
No mixing of bunkers is allowed and bunker supply is allowed up to 85% of individual tank capacity. Bunker tank reserved for ECA compliant fuel cannot accommodate IFO 380 CST.
All bunker replenishment shall be done at sa/sb and in no case vessel shall intake opl bunker. All fuel delivered to the vessel shall comply with ISO standard 8217:2010 or any subsequent amendments thereof and it has to be mineral oil product and not to contain tar oil and/or inorganic acid substances, to be free of contamination by non-mineral oil, chemicals and lub oils and always of stable and homogeneous nature. Notwithstanding any other clauses to the contrary in this charter party, any fuel supplied to the vessel shall not exceed 60mg/kg of aluminum + silicon content and 0.5% of sulphur content. The product to be delivered will be fit for its intended purpose.
All details about / given to the best of owners knowledge but without guarantee.
B.RGDS/TU OH
